title: Deserter
writer: Nina Agadzhanova, M. Krasnostavsky, Aleksandr Lazebnikov
actors: Boris Livanov, Vasili Kovrigin, Aleksandr Chistyakov
plot: A wise and forgiving communist leader decides to send a young worker, Karl Renn, as an international delegate to the Soviet Union after the worker had deserted a picket-line and had expressed doubts about the methods of class stru...
